news.text: Novo Nordisk's explosive Wegovy pill launch draws a new wave of patients into GLP-1 weight loss treatment
ASML shares fall after proposed U.S. export curbs target an already fragile China market
Iran war upends spring housing market. Here's what real estate agents are seeing
UK services firms report surge in costs, fading optimism as Iran war takes toll - Reuters
Iran war jeopardizes U.S. global leadership, warns Italian minister - Reuters
Exclusive: Russia supplies Iran with cyber support, spy imagery to hone attacks, Ukraine says - Reuters

brief:
◆ Market Overview

Futures are catching a modest bid across the board with the SPY up 0.47% to $658.93, despite geopolitical chaos from Iran escalating tensions. VIX dropped 2.36% to 33.88, suggesting some fear premium is coming out, but we're still trading elevated volatility levels that demand respect.

◆ What to Watch

  • ASML weakness - Semiconductor bellwether getting hit on new U.S. export restrictions to China, watch for sector contagion
  • Novo Nordisk GLP-1 momentum - Wegovy pill launch creating fresh tailwinds in weight loss treatment space
  • Iran conflict escalation - Military advisories on Iranian transportation, housing markets getting disrupted globally
  • Light earnings slate - PACB, AEHR, XELB reporting after hours, but no major movers expected

◆ Sector Rotation

Consumer Staples leading at +0.94% with Financials (+0.71%) and Energy (+0.73%) showing strength - classic defensive rotation with a war premium. Healthcare lagging at -0.36% despite Novo's GLP-1 news, while Materials (-0.38%) and Utilities (-0.37%) getting sold as higher-for-longer rates bite.
⚡ Key Driver
Iran conflict creating dual impact: defensive rotation into staples/energy while risk-off sentiment caps upside momentum
⚠ Bear Case
VIX still elevated at 33.88 signals underlying stress. ASML weakness could trigger broader tech selloff if China export fears spread
✦ Bull Case
Market grinding higher despite war headlines shows underlying resilience. Financials outperforming suggests confidence in economic backdrop

◆ Levels That Matter

  • SPY $655 - Key support from Friday's low, break targets $650 gap fill
  • QQQ $585 - Previous resistance now support, watch for ASML contagion
  • VIX 35 - Next resistance level, break higher signals fresh risk-off wave
  • XLE $95 - Energy strength continuation level on Iran premium

Not a prediction. A preparation. Make your plan before the bell.
